description: Off-topic requests stay inside hotel reservations.

turns.user: Can you tell me the weather?

description: Financial-advice requests are redirected even when mixed with booking words.

turns.user: Should I take out a loan to pay for my stay?

description: Availability comes from the business tool.

turns.user: I need a room from August 12 to August 14 for two guests.

description: Retrying an identical booking returns the same confirmation, never a duplicate.

turns.user: I need a room from August 12 to August 14 for two guests.
Book it for Priya Shah at priya@example.com.
Book it again for Priya Shah at priya@example.com.

description: Checking an existing reservation is answered, never deflected — but needs identifying details first (goal.md, user-reported 2026-07-22).

turns.user: Do I have a booking at your hotel already?

description: A confirmation code that doesn't exist returns a clear not-found result, never an invented booking.

turns.user: Can you check my reservation? My confirmation code is AH-000000.

description: An existing reservation is found by guest name plus contact when no confirmation code is given.

turns.user: I need a room from August 12 to August 14 for two guests.
Book it for Priya Shah at priya@example.com.
Can you confirm my reservation? My name is Priya Shah and my email is priya@example.com.

description: Hotel policy answers are retrieved from the local knowledge base.

turns.user: What is the cancellation policy?

description: Parking costs are retrieved from the knowledge base with the correct source.

turns.user: How much is parking at the hotel?

description: Accessibility answers are grounded in the knowledge base, not invented.

turns.user: Do you have accessible rooms?

description: A policy question retrieves knowledge after an off-topic refusal.

turns.user: What is today's FIFA score?
Sure, what does the cancellation policy look like?

description: The same session can switch to Spanish.

turns.user: Please speak Spanish.
Necesito una habitación para dos personas.
Let me switch back to English.
¡Gracias!

description: Room service hours come from the dedicated business tool, not model memory.

turns.user: What are your room service hours?

description: The same session can switch to French, stay grounded, and switch back.

turns.user: Please speak French.
Je voudrais une chambre pour deux personnes.
Quelle est la politique d'annulation ?
Switch back to English.
Merci !

description: A human request produces the transfer control action.

turns.user: Connect me to a person.

description: A completed call produces the hangup control action.

turns.user: Goodbye.
